title: Integration by Substitution
description: Method for evaluating integrals using u-substitution
mermaid: graph TD A1[**Start**: Define the Integral to Evaluate (∫f(g(x))g'(x) dx)] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#ffffff B1["**Identify** Inner Function: g(x)"] style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 C1["**Set**: u = g(x)"] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff D1["**Calculate**: du/dx = g'(x)"] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff E1["**Solve for**: dx = du / g'(x)"] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff F1["**Substitute**: u and dx into the Integral: ∫f(u) du"] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff G1{"**Is the Resulting Integral Simpler to Evaluate?**"} style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H1[**Yes**: Evaluate the Simpler Integral: ∫f(u) du = F(u) + C] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff I1["**Substitute Back**: Replace u with g(x): F["g(x)"] + C"] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff J1["**Verify**: Differentiate F["g(x)"] + C to check if it equals f(g(x))g'(x)"] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff K1[**End**: Final Result: F["g(x)"] + C] style K1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff L1[**No**: Try a Different Substitution or Method] style L1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#ffffff M1["Choose Alternative Method or different u"] style M1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 A1 --> B1 B1 --> C1 C1 --> D1 D1 --> E1 E1 --> F1 F1 --> G1 G1 -- Yes --> H1 H1 --> I1 I1 --> J1 J1 --> K1 G1 -- No --> L1 L1 --> M1 M1 --> B1
entities: **Start**: Define the Integral to Evaluate (∫f(g(x))g'(x) dx)
"**Substitute**: u and dx into the Integral: ∫f(u) du"
"**Is the Resulting Integral Simpler to Evaluate?**"}style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H1[**Yes**: Evaluate the Simpler Integral: ∫f(u) du = F(u) + C
"**Substitute Back**: Replace u with g(x): F(g(x)) + C"
"**Verify**: Differentiate F(g(x)) + C to check if it equals f(g(x))g'(x)"
**No**: Try a Different Substitution or Method
